comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. Verse (Moderato gracefully) + Refrain (happily). Heavy verse stacking in refrain — v1 and v2 interleaved on same notes. Pipeline at 136% lyric-to-note ratio. Truth provides v1-only lyrics. Several OCR garble issues in verse; 2nd ending lyrics completely missing from pipeline.

1.comment: Pipeline read direction 'p simply' as lyric 'simply'. Published: just 'The' (pickup). 2 notes — 'The' assigned to note[0]; alignment may be imperfect if note[0] is not the pickup.

3.comment: Pipeline had 'bun dred to one a'. Published: 'hun-dred to one a-'. OCR 'b' for 'h'.

12.comment: Pipeline had 'censed me .' with stray space. Published: 'censed me.'.

13.comment: Pipeline had 'v Oh, I' — 'v' is OCR garble. Published: 'Oh, I' on last 2 of 3 notes. Alignment imperfect (sequential assignment puts 'Oh,' on note[0] instead of note[1]).

14.comment: Pipeline had 'was n't a, bit con' — stray comma on 'a,'. Published: 'was-n't a bit con-'.

15.comment: Pipeline had 'cern ed For from' — 'cern ed' is two tokens. Published: 'cerned For from'.

18.comment: Pipeline had 'man y y times the' (5 on 5n). Published: 'man-y, man-y times the' (6 syllables). Pipeline lost a note (triplet). Unfixable — providing best 5 of 6, adding comma.

21.comment: Pipeline had 'Ay' — garbled pickup 'They' for refrain. Published: 'They' (refrain pickup).

22.comment: Pipeline stacked v1+v2: 'all all laugh laugh at at' (6 on 3n). Published v1: 'all laughed at' (pickup 'They' is in m21). 3 on 3n.

23.comment: Pipeline stacked v1+v2: 'Chris Rock to e pher fel Co ler lum Cen bus ter' (12 on 6n). Published v1: 'Chris-to-pher Co-lum-bus'.

25.comment: Pipeline had 'in' — this is v2 only ('get in'). v1 is a held note from 'round'. Clear v2 bleed.

26.comment: Pipeline stacked v1+v2: 'all all laugh laugh when at' (6 on 3n). Published v1: 'all laughed when'. Pickup 'They' missing (likely lost note).

27.comment: Pipeline stacked v1+v2: 'Ed Whit i ney son and re his cord cot ed ton sound. gin.' (14 on 7n). Published v1: 'Ed-i-son re-cord-ed sound.'.

29.comment: Pipeline had no lyrics on 1n+1r. Published: 'They' (pickup for next refrain phrase). Adding pickup.

30.comment: Pipeline had 'all lau at' (3 on 3n) — 'lau' is garbled 'laughed'. Published v1: 'all laughed at'.

31.comment: Pipeline stacked v1+v2: 'il Ful bur ton and and his his broth steam' (10 on 5n). Published v1: 'Wil-bur and his broth-'. OCR lost 'W' from 'Wil'.

32.comment: Pipeline stacked 13 lyrics on 7n. Published v1: 'er, When they said that man could' (continuation of 'broth-er,' then new phrase).

33.comment: Pipeline stacked v1+v2: 'fly bar' (2 on 1n). Published v1: 'fly.'.

37.comment: Pipeline had 'are. They latghed at' (v2 'are.' + garbled 'laughed'). Published v1: 'cry. They laughed at'.
